name: vibe-ui
description: Local-first DESIGN.md workflow skill for AI UI generation and design consistency checks.

scripts.release:check: npm test && node --check scripts/design.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-kit.mjs && node --check scripts/sync-open-design.mjs && node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package minimal --check && node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package standard --check && node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package offline-full --check
scripts.release:dry-run: node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package minimal --dry-run && node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package standard --dry-run && node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package offline-full --dry-run
scripts.release:zip: npm run release:check && node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package minimal && node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package standard && node scripts/publish-kit.mjs --platform all --package offline-full
scripts.release:smoke: root=$(pwd) && tmp=$(mktemp -d) && node scripts/design.mjs list && node scripts/design.mjs workflow landing --design linear --template open-design:saas-landing && cd "$tmp" && node "$root/scripts/design.mjs" use linear && node "$root/scripts/design.mjs" read "AI release governance landing for healthcare compliance teams" --page landing --design linear --template open-design:saas-landing && node "$root/scripts/design.mjs" brief-check landing --design linear --template open-design:saas-landing && node "$root/scripts/design.mjs" generate landing --template open-design:saas-landing && node "$root/scripts/design.mjs" report DESIGN.md && node "$root/scripts/design.mjs" critique DESIGN.md && node "$root/scripts/design.mjs" polish DESIGN.md
